brand-story-bg-7a4e1c.query: Jewelry with Intention Velmora was born from a simple belief: that beautiful jewelry shouldn't cost the earth — literally or figuratively. Every piece is crafted from recycled metals, plated in rich 18K gold, and designed to become part of your everyday story.
